name: Pixel Art XL
description: Crisp pixel-art style for SDXL. Add the trigger to the prompt.

name: LCM-LoRA SDXL
description: Latent-consistency accelerator for SDXL — few-step generation. Pair with the LCM sampler and low guidance (~1).

name: LCM-LoRA SD 1.5
description: Latent-consistency accelerator for SD 1.5 — few-step generation. Pair with the LCM sampler and low guidance (~1).

name: IKEA Instructions XL
description: Turns any subject into a deadpan IKEA-manual assembly diagram. No trigger needed — prompt the object plainly.

description: Clean stylised 3D-render look for SDXL. Add the trigger to the prompt.

name: FLUX Super Realism
description: Photorealism boost for FLUX. Works on the non-GGUF flux-dev / flux-schnell bases only (LoRAs can't apply to GGUF). Add the trigger to the prompt.

description: Whimsical hand-drawn storybook illustration style for FLUX. Non-GGUF flux-dev / flux-schnell only. Add the trigger to the prompt.

description: Soft, painterly anime style for FLUX. Non-GGUF flux-dev / flux-schnell only. Add the trigger to the prompt.

description: Anime character art for FLUX. Non-GGUF flux-dev / flux-schnell only. Add the trigger to the prompt.

name: FLUX Vintage Ads
description: Retro mid-century advertisement style for FLUX. Non-GGUF flux-dev / flux-schnell only. Prefix the prompt with the trigger.

description: Soft hand-painted Studio-Ghibli anime style for SD 1.5. Add the trigger to the prompt.

name: Ultra Real - Klein 9B
description: Photoreal detailing for FLUX.2 klein 9B. 9B ONLY — won't apply to the 4B model. Civitai source: set a Civitai API key in Settings. Add the trigger to the prompt.

name: Image Repair - Klein 4B
description: Compression-artifact repair / quality boost for FLUX.2 klein 4B — trained to fix web-image artifacts while preserving identity. 4B ONLY — won't apply to the 9B model. Civitai source: set a Civitai API key in Settings. Add the trigger to the prompt.
